---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in the BoxViewer Android app or the share.boxviewer.app web page
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: nichu42
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Which part of BoxViewer is affected?**
- [ ] Android app (`de.nichu42.boxviewer`)
- [ ] Web sharing page (`https://share.boxviewer.app`)

---

**Android app (complete if affected):**
- BoxViewer version: (Settings → About → Version, e.g. `0.45` / `versionCode 13`)
- Device: (e.g. Pixel 7, OnePlus 9, etc.)
- Android version: (e.g. Android 14, Android 15)
- ROM: (stock / GrapheneOS / CalyxOS / LineageOS / other)
- App source: (GitHub release APK / Obtainium build / F-Droid build / sideloaded)
- Install method: (clean install / update from previous version)

**Web sharing page (complete if affected):**
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04, iPadOS 17, Android 14)
- Browser: (e.g. Firefox 128, Chrome 127, Safari 17)
- Browser version:
- URL you were visiting: (e.g. `https://share.boxviewer.app/?id=...`)

---

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here. If you have the opt-in API debug log (`api_*.jsonl` from Settings → API debug log) or a logcat capture, please attach it.
